title: FHSS-25-26 Fall Semester Final Exam Schedule (Update: 20.01.2026 / 17.30)
content:
The 2025-2026 Fall Semester Final Exam Schedule

The 2025-2026 Fall Semester Final Exam Schedule is attached below.

You can get further information about the evaluation schedule for Homeworks/Presentations/Projects etc. from the lecturer of the course.

We wish you all the success in your exams.
